text.text: Repeated enemy attacks weaken your defenses. Defense Damage lowers armor, toughness, and the effects of some defensive on-hit armor traits. Boss attacks inflict more Defense Damage than normal creatures, while successfully blocking an attack prevents Defense Damage from building up.
After a short period without taking enemy damage, Defense Damage gradually recovers.
You can check your current Defense Damage status through Materials and You - Armory Addendum in your inventory.
